name: wilson-todo
description: UserPromptSubmit hook — when the user types a bare TODO keyword (`todo` / `TODO` / `할일` / `할 일`), inject a 5-column traffic-light table skeleton (우선 · id · 카테고리 · 설명 · 효과) as additionalContext, telling Claude to surface the pending work items from the prior user context this turn. Color enum: 🔴 Critical / 🟡 Important / 🟢 OK / ⚪ Backlog (sidecar canon from archive-nexus tool/rules_loader.hexa::level_to_severity). Header label appears only on the first row of each color group; subsequent rows leave column-1 empty for visual grouping (the dashboard-tri pattern from archive-nexus docs/atlas_meta_dashboard.md, commit ab098d20 2026-04-22). Pairs with wilson-roi (same 5-col schema, different headers) and wilson-list (next-up ordered sequence). Match is exact-after-strip+lower so `todo for next sprint` does NOT trigger — only a bare keyword. Sidecar-minimal: no codebase scanner, no persistence; the model surfaces and fills the table from context. Toggle: /sidecar off todo. Default ON. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_TODO=1.
